_comment: STAGING-ONLY ground truth for the M7 window. Consumed by cmd/staged-range -ground-truth-registry to auto-label canary-touch verdicts: the three legit generator identities are confirmed-benign, the prober identity is confirmed-malicious. These are REAL confirmations of an environment we built, fed through the same feedback seam an analyst uses (see internal/intelligence/stagedlabel). This file must never reach a production engine — cmd/engine cannot even import the labeler.
